beat.title: Into the Labyrinth
beat.boundaryReason: The session opens with the party recovering from the prior fight, choosing an entrance, and probing the first branching tunnels until they reach the warmer chamber split by a dark crack.

the transcript resumes directly from the prior exploration with no sleep, long rest, or next-day cue

beat.title: The Looping White Maze
beat.boundaryReason: The party leaves the corpse behind, follows booming corridors into impossible loops, glimpses wind-formed hunters, and finally sneaks through the collapsing maze into calmer passage.
dateEvidence: this beat begins immediately after the corpse investigation and remains part of the same uninterrupted delve
the party discusses worsening cold and whiteout conditions but never stops for a rest or sleep
escaping the loop happens on the same day because no transcript evidence supports a date advance

beat.title: Toward Zeyfa's Minion
beat.boundaryReason: Beyond the maze, the group retraces the booming gap, descends into a deeper circular chamber, hides Kalima, and ends on the cliffhanger reveal of the shaggy beast and its ice-born shadows as they prepare for initiative.
dateEvidence: the party comes straight out of the looping maze and continues deeper with no break in the expedition
Kalima's warning and the cliffhanger initiative call occur before any rest, camp, or next-morning cue
